programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Curtis Stone returns for the second night in a row and sets up the ultimate challenge, to create a winter warmer ice-cream and pair it with a dessert.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a young couple move.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The competitors face a Pressure Test with more than one surprise twist; a special guest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is blindsided when Mayor Chase bypasses him with a request for Jamie to head his security detail; Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a wealthy college student; Anthony fears money woes are leading his sibling down the wrong path.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A local celebrity asks Frank to make an exception to the NYPD age limit; an encounter with an old rival leads Erin to look into an alleged wrongful conviction; Jamie is torn over whether to report a sergeant; Danny and Baez look for an abducted kid.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Eight social media stars battle it out on three kitchen levels for a chance at the grand prize.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Moroccan bream; couscous salad; pomegranate and harissa; British burgers; shred salad; pickles and things.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes jerk pork, grilled corn and crunchy tortilla salad, minestrone, poached chicken and salsa verde.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Good Stuff With Mary Berg
programme.desc: From fashion to beauty to décor to restaurant quality eats, Mary and her experts reveal their favourite dupes; the cast of "Degrassi: Whatever It Takes.".

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary shows how embracing your oven and baking for breakfast is the ultimate game-changer to switch up the daily grind.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts prepares a homemade Thai feast.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Bone to Pick
programme.desc: Aurora Teagarden, librarian and proud member of the Real Murders Club, finds a human skull hidden in the window seat of her house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary whips up a lemon raspberry loaf with a bright pink glaze, lemon Parmesan chicken; creamy lemon crab pasta with a nutty sesame topping, and a lemonade that is infused with seasonal berries and fresh mint.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: International chef Curtis Stone sets the mystery box challenge; an hour to impress judges before the elimination round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: The bottom four from the invention round must do the Pressure Test; competitors must recreate a dessert dish by a top chocolatier to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Eliminated contestants have a second chance; one of the twelve can secure a place in the kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Competitors team up and create a three-course menu for 100 people; Matt Sinclair guest stars to mentor the competitors.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: The pop-up restaurant challenge leaves six members of the losing team with the threat of elimination; it's an elimination round with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Heston Blumenthal takes the remaining 12 on a journey through country Victoria; begins alongside Murray River as they create dishes along the way.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Competitors form teams of two to impress guest judge, Heston Blumenthal; must use a specially chosen element to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Guest judge Heston Blumenthal takes the team to Mildura; theme of the challenge is inspired by Earth elements; split into two groups of four in the hopes of avoiding elimination.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Real Murders
programme.desc: Master sleuth Aurora Teagarden (Candace Cameron Bure) must find a copycat killer who targets members of a crime-buff club.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary makes the freezer a friend by throwing together four recipes with frozen ingredient staples.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary shows how embracing your oven and baking for breakfast is the ultimate game-changer to switch up the daily grind.

programme.title: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A single mother becomes an unexpected hero after saving a stranger's life during an armed robbery. Intent on paying her back, the man's appreciation soon turns to obsession as he weaves his way into every aspect of her life.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin is stalked by a man who was recently released from prison; Jamie works to save his badge when he is caught driving under the influence after he is unknowingly given drugs at a party; Frank navigates multiple family issues.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie and Joe search for an undocumented teenage girl who has been sex-trafficked; a woman in witness protection is murdered; Frank calls out the district attorney's office for instituting a new rule that classifies armed robbery as a misdemeanor.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Eddie and Jamie deal with a domestic violence case associated with an investigation led by Danny and Baez; Frank and his friend go on a mission to avail themselves to an unfiltered look at the city; Erin is presented with a surprising offer.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate after a vicious attack leaves their mutual friend, Maggie Gibson, hospitalized; Frank and the team debate the appropriate memorial protocol for a former police commissioner with a questionable professional legacy.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank announces he will not endorse Erin's run for district attorney; Danny and Baez investigate a bloody crime scene at a hotel; Jamie begins a new job as a field intelligence sergeant that requires him to keep secrets from his family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate a series of violent robberies targeting luxury timepieces; Erin is conflicted about criminally charging a potentially innocent man; Frank is forced to reopen a case in which the officer involved was acquitted.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank launches an investigation after the Reagan family is harassed; Danny and Baez form an unlikely partnership with an informant in order to prevent a murder; Eddie lands in hot water after she defies a direct order.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Jamie clash over a gang-related shooting; Erin and Anthony search for answers when a lawyer in their office jeopardizes a case involving Erin's nephew; Frank grows concerned when he's not invited to speak at a policing forum.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
